problems.hint: Use s[::-1] for reversal and s.replace(' ', '') to clean spaces.

p1_setup.title: Reverse & Clean
p1_setup.desc: Reverse a sentence and remove all spaces. [cite: 3]

p1_switch.title: Case Flip
p1_switch.desc: Swap the case of every character in the string. [cite: 3]

p2_setup.title: Vowel Stripper
p2_setup.desc: Remove all vowels from a paragraph. [cite: 3]

p1_setup.title: Divisor Finder
p1_setup.desc: Find all divisors of N and store in a comma-separated string. [cite: 3]

p1_switch.title: Parity Sum
p1_switch.desc: Sum only the even divisors from the string. [cite: 3]

p2_setup.title: Initialism
p2_setup.desc: Extract initials from a full name in Uppercase. [cite: 3]

p2_switch.title: ASCII Weight
p2_switch.desc: Return the sum of ASCII values of the initials. [cite: 3]

p1_setup.title: Binary Conv
p1_setup.desc: Convert a decimal number to an 8-bit binary string. [cite: 3]

p1_switch.title: Bit Counter
p1_switch.desc: Count the number of 1s in that binary string. [cite: 3]

p2_setup.title: Digit Sum
p2_setup.desc: Find the sum of all digits in a given integer. [cite: 3]

p2_switch.title: Square It
p2_switch.desc: Return the square of that sum. [cite: 3]

problems.hint: Use set() to find unique elements quickly. [cite: 6]

p1_setup.title: Unique Extractor
p1_setup.desc: Return only unique numbers from a list. [cite: 6]

p1_switch.title: Stats Master
p1_switch.desc: Find the average of those unique numbers. [cite: 6]

p2_setup.title: Threshold Filter
p2_setup.desc: Return temperatures from a list that are > 37.5. [cite: 6]

p2_switch.title: Average Fever
p2_switch.desc: Calculate the mean of the filtered list. [cite: 6]

problems.hint: Iterate through the string to count specific characters. [cite: 6]

p1_setup.title: Odd-Even Split
p1_setup.desc: Join odds with '-' and evens with '*'. [cite: 6]

p1_switch.title: Separator Count
p1_switch.desc: Count the number of '-' in the string. [cite: 6]

p2_setup.title: Diagonal Sum
p2_setup.desc: Find the sum of the primary diagonal of a $3 	imes 3$ matrix. [cite: 6]

p2_switch.title: Square Root
p2_switch.desc: Return the square root of that sum (2 decimals). [cite: 6]

p1_setup.title: The Navigator
p1_setup.desc: Calculate (x, y) from a direction string. [cite: 9]

p2_setup.title: Hex Validator
p2_setup.desc: Validate a 6-char Hex code and return decimal sum. [cite: 9]

p2_switch.title: Perfect Square
p2_switch.desc: Check if that sum is a perfect square. [cite: 9]

p1_setup.title: Vowel Counter
p1_setup.desc: Count the total number of vowels in a word. [cite: 12]

p1_switch.title: Double Up
p1_switch.desc: Multiply that count by 2 and return the result. [cite: 12]

p2_switch.title: Char Count
p2_switch.desc: Return the total number of characters in that greeting. [cite: 12]

problems.hint: Use N % 10 to get the rightmost digit. [cite: 12]

p1_setup.title: Last Digit
p1_setup.desc: Find the last digit of a given number N. [cite: 12]

p1_switch.title: Parity Check
p1_switch.desc: Return 'Even' if the digit is even, else 'Odd'. [cite: 12]

p2_switch.title: Start Search
p2_switch.desc: Check if the reversed word starts with 'e'. [cite: 12]

problems.hint: Convert to string or divide by 100 to get the first digits. [cite: 12]

p1_setup.title: Century Check
p1_setup.desc: Take a year and return the first two digits. [cite: 12]

p2_setup.title: Secret Code
p2_setup.desc: Replace 's' with '$' in any given word. [cite: 12]

p2_switch.title: ASCII Value
p2_switch.desc: Find the ASCII value of the second character. [cite: 12]
